core_concepts: Laser safety training documentation and acknowledgment
Training curriculum overview for laser safety officers and personnel
Multi-modal training approach (classroom, articles, on-site evaluation)

key_terms.definition: Formal document confirming receipt and understanding of laser safety training
Designated personnel responsible for laser safety program oversight
Health risks to eyes and skin from laser radiation exposure
Federal, State and Local regulatory authority contacts
Practical field evaluation component of laser safety training

regulatory_references: Federal laser safety regulations (implied by reference to governing agencies)
State and local laser safety regulations
Record keeping requirements for safety training
learning_objectives: Understand the scope of laser safety training curriculum
Recognize the importance of documented training acknowledgment
Identify key topic areas covered in comprehensive laser safety training
Know the roles and responsibilities of laser safety personnel
